proposal.working_title: AI Customer Support Automation: The Operator Playbook for Cutting Ticket Volume Without Cutting Trust
proposal.one_line_angle: Most AI support automation deflects tickets and quietly erodes trust. Here is the operator playbook for cutting ticket volume while keeping customers confident.
outline_bullets: Why deflection-first AI customer support automation erodes trust faster than it cuts cost
The six systems an operator-grade support automation stack actually needs, from intent routing to agent-assist to escalation governance
Building the playbook: knowledge-base grounding, confidence thresholds, human handoff rules, and the metrics that prove trust held

discovery_evidence.reason: Daily-idea re-run 2026-05-15 after inventory refresh (157 -> 245 posts). Friday rotation = accenture.com.

discovery_evidence.searchable_aeo: AI Systems / customer-ops prompts at 0% mention rate.
